title: The Lawless City
overview: Cid and his sister Claire venture to the huge slum known as the “Lawless City.” There, Cid gets caught up in the commotion caused by the Red Moon.

title: The Haven
overview: The moon is red. The frenzy has begun. Shadow is introduced to power players in Lawless City. Meanwhile, Mary and Claire run into Juggernaut.

title: The Hour of Awakening
overview: The night the red moon rises, the Blood Queen Elisabeth makes her return.

title: Mask of Falsehood
overview: The Mitsugoshi Company is doing great, all thanks to Gamma! However, the biggest crisis imaginable rears its ugly head.

title: He Who Pulls the Strings
overview: Alpha and Gamma carefully plot not take any actions that would implicate Mitsugoshi's connection to Shadow Garden. Meanwhile, John Smith has a plot of his own.

title: John Smith
overview: John Smith's skill is leagues above even the most skilled fighters! Who is this mysterious person?

title: Something Precious
overview: The Major Corporate Alliance has forced closure of all their storefronts, bringing the citizens' unrest to its peak. But can Shadow Garden weather the storm?

title: The Dragon’s Tears
overview: With Cid missing and things getting hot, the Shadow Garden springs into action. At the Mitsugoshi Hot Springs Land that is!

title: The Key
overview: On the way to the Kingdom of Oriana, Cid is also on a journey of self-discovery and reflection. He feels like something's missing. Is he imagining it?

title: Caged Bird
overview: Did Princess Rose Oriana take it upon herself to join up with the enemy? Not even the Seven Shadows have authority over this matter anymore.

title: Determination
overview: With Princess Rose’s hands tied as Perv has taken her mother hostage, the Eminence in Shadow must move to free the captive himself.

title: HIGHEST
overview: Let the banquet of slaughter begin in the season finale.
